title: Hornet Removal in New Brunswick, NJ | $350 - $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in New Brunswick, NJ. Safe, effective elimination of hornet nests. Pricing $350-$550. Licensed experts serving New Brunswick and surrounding areas.
intro: New Brunswick residents facing aggressive hornet infestations need fast, professional solutions to protect their homes and families. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout New Brunswick, from the historic downtown district to residential neighborhoods near Rutgers University. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations with proven methods tailored to New Jersey's unique pest challenges.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of specialized experience to New Brunswick, offering same-day emergency hornet removal services with licensed, insured technicians who understand the specific pest pressures facing New Jersey properties. We use safe, environmentally responsible treatment methods and provide comprehensive warranties to ensure your home or business remains hornet-free.
localContext: New Brunswick's mix of historic Victorian homes, modern apartment complexes near Rutgers campus, and commercial buildings along George Street creates numerous opportunities for hornets to establish nests in eaves, attics, and outdoor structures. The city's proximity to the Raritan River and tree-lined neighborhoods like Feaster Park provide ideal conditions for hornet colonies, making professional removal essential for property safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a hornet emergency in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout New Brunswick, typically arriving within 2-4 hours of your call. We understand that hornet nests near entryways or high-traffic areas pose immediate danger, especially for families and businesses in densely populated areas near Rutgers and downtown New Brunswick.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to eliminate remaining hornets, preventative measures to discourage future nesting, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on nest location, size, and accessibility, with most New Brunswick properties falling within this range.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, New Brunswick's tree-covered residential areas, older architectural structures, and proximity to the Raritan River create favorable conditions for bald-faced hornets and European hornets. These species typically build nests in spring and early summer, becoming increasingly aggressive through late summer and fall when protecting their mature colonies.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods that eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to residents, pets, and beneficial insects. Our technicians wear protective equipment and establish safety perimeters during removal. We recommend keeping family members and pets indoors during the treatment process, after which the area is completely safe, typically within a few hours.
